root_cause.text: The XML parsers (`DocumentBuilder` and `TransformerFactory`) are configured with default settings that allow the resolution of external entities, which can lead to XML External Entity (XXE) injection vulnerabilities when parsing untrusted XML input.
root_cause.evidence: The patch mitigates the vulnerability by setting a custom `SafeEmptyEntityResolver` that returns an empty string for resolved entities, and by restricting external DTDs and stylesheets via `XMLConstants.ACCESS_EXTERNAL_DTD` and `XMLConstants.ACCESS_EXTERNAL_STYLESHEET`.

agent_logs.root_cause_candidate: The XML parsers (`DocumentBuilder` and `TransformerFactory`) are configured with default settings that allow the resolution of external entities, which can lead to XML External Entity (XXE) injection vulnerabilities when parsing untrusted XML input.
agent_logs.evidence_points: The patch mitigates the vulnerability by setting a custom `SafeEmptyEntityResolver` that returns an empty string for resolved entities, and by restricting external DTDs and stylesheets via `XMLConstants.ACCESS_EXTERNAL_DTD` and `XMLConstants.ACCESS_EXTERNAL_STYLESHEET`.

intent_record.intent_summary: Add EntityResolver import to support XML parsing configuration.
intent_record.what: Added an import statement for org.xml.sax.EntityResolver.
intent_record.how: Makes the EntityResolver interface available for use within the Java class, typically used to control how external XML entities are resolved.

intent_record.what: Added an import statement for java.io.StringReader.
intent_record.how: Makes the StringReader class available for use within the Java file.

intent_record.intent_summary: Add a safe entity resolver to prevent XML external entity (XXE) vulnerabilities during parsing.
intent_record.what: A SafeEmptyEntityResolver is set on the DocumentBuilder instance before parsing the document.
intent_record.how: This prevents the XML parser from resolving external entities, effectively mitigating XXE (XML External Entity) attacks during document processing.

intent_record.intent_summary: Configure DocumentBuilder with a safe entity resolver to prevent XXE injection during XML parsing.
intent_record.what: Added a SafeEmptyEntityResolver to the DocumentBuilder instance.
intent_record.how: Prevents the XML parser from resolving external entities, thereby mitigating XML External Entity (XXE) vulnerabilities.

intent_record.intent_summary: Add SafeEmptyEntityResolver to prevent XML External Entity (XXE) attacks.
intent_record.what: Added a SafeEmptyEntityResolver class that implements EntityResolver.
intent_record.how: Provides a way to resolve XML entities to an empty InputSource, thereby preventing external entity resolution.

intent_record.intent_summary: Update import statements to support enhanced XML parsing configuration.
intent_record.what: Modifies import statements by adding XML-related classes and removing standard I/O classes.
intent_record.how: Provides the necessary class dependencies to configure and handle XML parsing, likely for secure document building.

intent_record.intent_summary: Disable external entity and stylesheet resolution in TransformerFactory to prevent XXE attacks.
intent_record.what: Added attributes to restrict external DTDs and stylesheets on the TransformerFactory, wrapped in a try-catch block.
intent_record.how: Secures the XML transformation process by preventing the resolution of external entities and stylesheets, thereby avoiding XXE vulnerabilities.

intent_record.intent_summary: Set a safe entity resolver to prevent XML External Entity (XXE) vulnerabilities during XML parsing.
intent_record.what: Added a SafeEmptyEntityResolver to the DocumentBuilder.
intent_record.how: Prevents the XML parser from resolving external entities during parsing.

intent_record.intent_summary: Add SafeEmptyEntityResolver to mitigate XXE vulnerabilities by neutralizing external entity resolution.
intent_record.what: Added a new private static class SafeEmptyEntityResolver that implements EntityResolver.
intent_record.how: Provides a mechanism to return an empty InputSource for any resolved entity, which can be used to prevent XML External Entity (XXE) attacks during XML parsing.

grouping_result.intent: Add EntityResolver import to support XML parsing configuration.
Add SafeEmptyEntityResolver to mitigate XXE vulnerabilities by neutralizing external entity resolution.
Update import statements to support enhanced XML parsing configuration.

consistency_review.core_intent: Mitigate XML External Entity (XXE) vulnerabilities by using safe entity resolvers and disabling external entity resolution.

relevance_review.reason: Adding the EntityResolver import is a necessary step to configure the XML parser to block external entity resolution, directly addressing the XXE vulnerability.
Adding an import for StringReader is an unrelated change and does not address the XML parser configuration or the XXE vulnerability.

The group directly mitigates the XML External Entity (XXE) vulnerability by configuring DocumentBuilder and TransformerFactory with safe entity resolvers and disabling external entity resolution, which directly addresses the stated root cause.
Updating import statements to support enhanced XML parsing configuration is directly related to addressing the XXE vulnerability by providing the necessary classes to secure the XML parsers.

candidates.rationale: Creation of DocumentBuilder without secure configuration against XXE.
Creation of DocumentBuilder without secure configuration against XXE.
Creation of TransformerFactory without secure attributes disabling external entity resolution.
Creation of DocumentBuilder without secure configuration against XXE.

vuln_statements.explanation: Creates a DocumentBuilder instance without securing it against XXE attacks.

Creates a DocumentBuilder instance without securing it against XXE attacks.

Implement filling and removing XFA forms

(DEVSIX-324)
bic_trace_step.code_snippet:
commit 050687b386acfc1c27d3826d0a9936a3f042b09e
Author: Dmitry Trusevich <dmitry.trusevich@duallab.com>
Date:   Thu Nov 12 17:31:01 2015 +0300

    Implement filling and removing XFA forms
    
    (DEVSIX-324)

diff --git a/forms/src/main/java/com/itextpdf/forms/xfa/XfaForm.java b/forms/src/main/java/com/itextpdf/forms/xfa/XfaForm.java
new file mode 100644
index 000000000..df048a7e9
--- /dev/null
+++ b/forms/src/main/java/com/itextpdf/forms/xfa/XfaForm.java
@@ -0,0 +1,557 @@
+package com.itextp
bic_trace_step.reason: The functions `fillXfaForm` and `initXfaForm` instantiate `DocumentBuilderFactory.newInstance()` and directly call `newDocumentBuilder().parse(...)` without configuring any features to disable external entity resolution or DTDs, exposing it to XXE attacks.
